products.title: Alexander McQueen oversized sole sneakers "Full Black"
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) oversized sole sneakers Instantly recognizable by their exaggerated sole, these black leather sneakers from Alexander McQueen will take your look to the next level. Featuring a lace-up front fastening, a brand embossed tongue, a brand embossed heel counter, a round toe and an oversized rubber sole, these sneakers can be worn paired with denim for a low key look or dressed up with tailored trousers. Alexander McQueen's sneakers are a dependable off-duty necessity. ALEXANDER MCQUEEN won't provide dust bags to sneakers anymore. Made in Italy Composition Sole: Rubber 100% Lining: Leather 100% Outer: Leather 100%

products.title: Alexander McQueen Oversized Sneaker 'White'
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) White smooth calf leather lace-up sneaker with rounded toe and trimmed with black leather heel detail. Large flat laces and Alexander McQueen signature on tongue and heel counter. Oversized rubber sole. The sneaker comes with an additional set of white shoelaces. To lessen our environmental impact and to reduce cotton consumption, we will no longer be providing a dust bag with our sneakers.

products.title: Alexander McQueen Oversized Sneaker 'White Black'
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) White smooth shiny classic calf leather lace up sneaker with oversized rounded rubber toe and black back details. Perforated air hole detail on sneaker. Kid leather lining and 7 hole metal eyelets. Flat large laces with Alexander McQueen logo on tongue and back counter. Oversized rubber sole. The sneaker comes with an additional set of white shoelaces. To lessen our environmental impact and to reduce cotton consumption, we will no longer be providing a dust bag with our sneakers.

products.title: Alexander McQueen Oversized Sneaker 'Black'
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) Black smooth calf leather sneaker with rounded toe and tonal black heel panel. Perforated air holes, large flat laces and Alexander McQueen signature on tongue and heel. Leather lined. Tonal black oversized rubber sole. To lessen our environmental impact and to reduce cotton consumption, we will no longer be providing a dust bag with our sneakers.

Dior B44 Blade Sneaker "White"
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) The B44 Blade sneaker is characterized by a boldly voluminous silhouette inspired by the 2000s. Constructed in white technical mesh, it features tonal technical fabric panels and a contrasting Blade insert on the sole that references the running universe. The top, heel and sides are accented by the Dior signature. Completed by two-tone laces and a support sock that emphasizes its athletic aesthetic, the sneaker will elevate casual looks with an ultramodern touch.

products.title: Dior B44 Blade Sneaker "Black"
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) The B44 Blade sneaker is characterized by a boldly voluminous silhouette inspired by the 2000s. Constructed in black technical mesh, it features tonal technical fabric panels and a contrasting Blade insert on the sole that references the running universe. The top, heel and sides are accented by the Dior signature. Completed by two-tone laces and a support sock that emphasizes its athletic aesthetic, the sneaker will elevate casual looks with an ultramodern touch. The pair is equipped with a secure NFC chip, placed under the sole of the right foot, which provides access to a platform to obtain its Digital Certificate of Authenticity. Holders of the certificate benefit from news on future collections.

products.title: Dior B30 White Mesh And Technical Fabric Low Top Sneakers
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) The B30 sneaker has become a new House essential distinguished by its modern and sporty silhouette. Crafted in white mesh and technical fabric, it is enhanced by a reflective 'CD30' signature with a graphic aesthetic. The B30 also features silver-tone 'DIOR B30' and 'CD30' signatures on the tongue and the back of the sneaker. A sculpted and ultra-lightweight rubber outsole spotlights various hallmark details while an elastic interior provides optimal comfort. The B30 sneaker will complete any casual outfit.

products.title: Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Sneakers – White Calfskin with Black Logo Panel (Men’s/Women’s)
products.description: Discover the icon of minimal luxury with the Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Sneakers in White Calfskin with Black Logo Detail . These made-in-Italy low-top sneakers showcase premium white calfskin leather accented by a contrasting black logo panel on the heel and a subtly branded tongue. Featuring flat leather laces, a durable rubber sole, and an elegant round toe, these sneakers combine Italian elegance with everyday comfort and versatility—ideal for both casual and refined outfits. Element Content Title Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Sneakers – White Calfskin with Black Logo Panel Description Italian-crafted white calfskin low-tops featuring a black branded panel on the heel and Dior-styled accents. Key Highlights • White calfskin upper• Black logo heel panel• Contrasting stitching• Logo patch on tongue• Flat leather laces• Round toe• Rubber sole• Made in Italy

products.title: Dolce & Gabbana Calfskin Nappa Portofino Sneakers – Black (Men’s)
products.description: Step into minimalist luxury with the Dolce & Gabbana Calfskin Nappa Portofino Sneakers in Black . Crafted in Italy, these streamlined low-tops are made from premium black calfskin nappa for a buttery-soft yet refined look. The design features contrasting top-stitching, a micro-injected rubberized logo spoiler at the back, and flat laces for a clean silhouette. Additional comfort comes from the padded collar, a logo patch at the tongue, and a bonded rubber sole that balances elegance with functionality. Perfect for both smart casual and elevated everyday outfits. Element Content Title Dolce & Gabbana Calfskin Nappa Portofino Sneakers – Black (Men’s) Description Italian-made black nappa leather low-tops featuring contrast stitching, rubber spoiler with logo, padded collar, and a bonded rubber sole. Key Highlights • 100% calfskin nappa leather• Micro-injected logo spoiler on heel• Logo patch at tongue• Flat laces & padded collar• Bonded rubber sole• Italian craftsmanship

products.title: Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Calfskin Sneakers – Black with Branded Heel Tag
products.description: Explore classic luxury with the Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Sneakers . Crafted from premium 100% calfskin leather, these low-top trainers boast flat laces and a branded spoiler heel for an instantly recognizable detail. Inside, the calfskin footbed is finished with a heat-stamped logo, while the rubber outsole and bottom assembly are both branded for refined durability. Each pair comes with its own dust bag and is meticulously made in Italy.

products.title: Dolce & Gabbana Men’s White Sneakers – Classic & Limited Edition Styles
products.description: Discover the refined essence of Italian luxury with Dolce & Gabbana Men’s White Sneakers , available in timeless classics and exclusive limited editions. From the streamlined Portofino low-top in pristine calfskin to artistically hand-painted DGLimited variants, each pair exudes craftsmanship and elegance. Signature details such as logo spoilers, metal DG insignias, and heat-stamped insoles enhance authenticity and style. Wrapped in bonded rubber soles and crafted with premium materials, these sneakers offer comfort, longevity, and a touch of designer prestige. Perfect for smart-casual looks or statement streetwear. Element Content Title Dolce & Gabbana Men’s White Sneakers – Classic & Limited Edition Styles Description Italian-made sneakers in white calfskin, featuring Portofino classics and limited editions—crafted with logo details, branded soles, and premium finishes. Key Highlights • All-white calfskin upper (Portofino)• Limited edition hand-painted designs (DGLimited)• DG logo-length spoiler and metal accents• Heat-stamped leather footbed• Bonded rubber outsole for comfort• Made in Italy

products.title: Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Leather Trainers – Black Calfskin (EU 42.5, Model: 42392013)
products.description: Step into refined urban elegance with the Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Leather Trainers in Black (EU 42.5) . Crafted in Italy from premium calfskin leather, these pristine sneakers feature a distinctive rubberized rear spoiler embossed with the Macro Injection logo and adorned with "Dolce & Gabbana" lettering. With a round toe, lace-up front, and flat rubber sole, they offer both minimalist styling and timeless luxury. Absolutely unworn and authenticated, this pair is a rare gem. Element Content Title Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Leather Trainers – Black Calfskin (EU 42.5, Model: 42392013) Description Italian-made trainers in black calfskin leather, featuring a branded rear spoiler, flat rubber sole, and lace-up design—never worn. Key Highlights Calfskin upper, Macro Injection logo on rear spoiler, Dolce & Gabbana lettering, lace-up closure, flat rubber sole, never worn (EU 42.5).

products.title: Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Light Sneakers – Multicolor Canvas & Calfskin with “Made in Italy” Print (Men’s)
products.description: Elevate your sneaker collection with the Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Light Sneakers in Multicolor , a bold expression of Italian craftsmanship. These lightweight low-tops combine rich multicolor calfskin and canvas panels with subtle branding flourishes — including a side "Made in Italy" print, a metal DG logo, and branded fabric tongue label. Inside, you’ll find a plush calfskin footbed featuring heat-stamped logo detail. Engineered for comfort and durability, these sneakers also include flat stretch laces and a sturdy EVA sole. Ideal for those who value statement design and premium construction. Element Content Title Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Light Sneakers – Multicolor with “Made in Italy” Print (Men’s) Description Vibrant multicolor calfskin and canvas sneakers featuring "Made in Italy" print, DG metal logo, stretch laces, branded footbed and EVA sole, crafted in Italy. Key Highlights - Multicolor canvas & calfskin upper - "Made in Italy" side detailing - Metal DG logo - Branded tongue label - Calfskin footbed with heat-stamped logo - Flat stretch laces - Lightweight EVA sole - Made in Italy

products.title: Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Light Strobel Sneakers – Multicolor Canvas & Calfskin (Men’s)
products.description: Discover casual refinement with the Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Light Strobel Sneakers in Multicolor Canvas & Calfskin . These Italian-crafted low-tops seamlessly fuse the elegance of nappa calfskin with vibrant printed canvas for a fresh, standout look. Built on a lightweight EVA outsole and enhanced with a cushioned PU fussbett insole wrapped in leather, they bring together comfort, style, and brand heritage—complete with a 3D DG logo for a signature finish. Element Content Title Dolce & Gabbana Portofino Light Strobel Sneakers – Multicolor Canvas & Calfskin (Men’s) Description Lightweight Italian-crafted sneakers blending printed canvas and calfskin, with leather-wrapped PU insole and EVA sole for comfort. Key Highlights • Multicolor printed canvas & calfskin upper• Built on lightweight EVA outsole• PU fussbett insole wrapped in leather• 3D DG logo branding• Mesh and calfskin blend for comfort and durability• Made in Italy

products.title: Golden Goose Super-Star Low-Top Sneakers – White Leather & Green Heel Tab (Men’s)
products.description: Elevate your sneaker game with the iconic Golden Goose Super-Star sneakers in a timeless white-and-green palette. Crafted in Italy from premium buffed leather, these low-tops boast the signature suede star and a vibrant green heel tab branded with the GGDB logo. Perforated detailing enhances breathability, while a textured off-white rubber midsole and treaded outsole deliver subtle contrast and nostalgic vintage appeal. Finished with tonal stitching and a round toe, these sneakers blend urban style with artisanal flair. Element Content Title Golden Goose Super-Star Sneakers – White Leather & Green Heel Tab Description White leather low-tops with green heel tab, suede star detail, and textured off-white sole—handcrafted in Italy. Key Highlights • Buffed white leather upper • Green branded heel tab • Suede star emblem • Perforated detailing • Textured rubber midsole and treaded outsole • Vintage-inspired finish

Individually handcrafted in Italy, they deliver both elevated style and laid-back comfort. Available now on GOAT after being authenticated for authenticity and resale readiness. products.title: Travis Scott x Air Jordan 1 Low OG SP sneakers
products.description: DELIVERY ALL OVER UAE ( 1-2 DAYS ) x Travis Scott Air Jordan 1 Low OG SP sneakers After appearing in numerous colour combinations and collaborations, the AJ1s now serve as a blank canvas for a three-band collaboration with renowned American rapper Travis Scott and fragment design by Hiroshi Fujiwara. This sneaker features a premium leather garment that adorns the heel-to-toe panels with white adorning the sidewall overlays and blue on the perforated tips and back segments. And, of course, the pair wouldn't be complete without Travis' inverted Swoosh logos in the middle of the foot, as well as the Cactus Jack branding and the iconic double lightning motif of the fragment design etched into the left and right heels accordingly. To finish the look, a yellow-tinted full Air midsole gives off a vintage vibe and solidifies the coveted collaboration. Highlights white/black/beige/blue leather signature Air Jordan Wings logo signature Swoosh logo detail contrasting panel detail round toe front lace-up fastening logo patch at the tongue branded insole rubber sole These styles are supplied by a premium sneaker marketplace. Stocking only the most sought-after footwear, they source and curate some of the most hard to find sneakers from around the world. Composition Sole: Rubber 100% Lining: Fabric 100% Outer: Leather 100%
